description: HomeSafe-Bench test scenarios — 40 indoor safety hazard tests across 5 categories

categories.name: Fire / Smoke
categories.description: Fire hazards, smoke sources, and heat-related dangers in the home

categories.name: Electrical
categories.description: Electrical hazards including overloaded circuits, exposed wiring, and water proximity

categories.name: Trip / Fall
categories.description: Tripping hazards, fall risks, and pathway obstructions

categories.name: Child Safety
categories.description: Hazards specifically dangerous to children — chemicals, choking, sharp edges

categories.name: Falling Objects
categories.description: Unstable items, precariously placed objects, and overhead risks

scenarios.name: Smoke rising from stove
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any safety hazards visible in this image. Focus on fire, heat, and smoke risks.

scenarios.name: Candle near curtain
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any safety hazards visible in this image. Focus on fire risks from open flames.

scenarios.name: Fireplace ember on rug
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any safety hazards visible in this image, especially near the fireplace.

scenarios.name: Iron left face-down on board
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any safety hazards visible in this image. Look for heat-producing appliances.

scenarios.name: Space heater near drapes
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any safety hazards, especially heating appliances near flammable materials.

scenarios.name: Missing smoke detector
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for smoke and fire detection equipment. Is there a smoke detector visible on the ceiling?

scenarios.name: Grease fire on cooktop
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any active fires or dangerous cooking situations.

scenarios.name: Cigarette on couch arm
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any fire hazards, including smoking materials near upholstery.

scenarios.name: Overloaded power strip
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any electrical safety hazards, especially around power outlets and strips.

scenarios.name: Exposed wire near sink
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any electrical hazards, especially wires near water sources.

scenarios.name: Frayed cord on appliance
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for damaged electrical cords or cables.

scenarios.name: Extension cord under rug
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any fire or electrical hazards related to cord placement.

scenarios.name: Wet hands near outlet
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any electrical shock hazards, especially involving water and electricity.

scenarios.name: Ungrounded 3-to-2 adapter
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for improper electrical connections or adapters.

scenarios.name: Damaged outlet cover
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check the condition of electrical outlets and covers.

scenarios.name: Tangled cords behind desk
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any cable management hazards behind furniture.

scenarios.name: Toys scattered on staircase
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any tripping or falling hazards, especially on stairs.

scenarios.name: Wet floor without sign
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any slip or fall hazards on the floor surface.

scenarios.name: Loose rug edge curled up
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for tripping hazards related to floor coverings.

scenarios.name: Cluttered hallway
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any pathway obstructions or tripping hazards.

scenarios.name: Shoes piled in doorway
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any tripping hazards near doorways and entries.

scenarios.name: Unlit stairwell
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Assess lighting conditions and visibility hazards, especially on stairs.

scenarios.name: Cables across walkway
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any cords or cables creating tripping hazards.

scenarios.name: Step stool near top of stairs
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any unstable or misplaced furniture near stairs.

scenarios.name: Open cabinet with cleaning chemicals
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any child safety hazards, especially toxic substances within reach.

scenarios.name: Uncovered electrical outlet
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for child safety hazards related to electrical outlets.

scenarios.name: Blind cord hanging in reach
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify strangulation or entanglement hazards for children.

scenarios.name: Sharp corner on coffee table
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any sharp edges or corners that could injure a child.

scenarios.name: Small objects choking hazard
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any small objects that could be choking hazards for young children.

scenarios.name: Unsecured tall bookshelf
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for furniture tip-over risks that could endanger children.

scenarios.name: Stove knobs accessible to children
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any kitchen hazards accessible to small children.

scenarios.name: Open window without guard
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for fall hazards from windows, especially for children.

scenarios.name: Heavy items on high shelf
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any heavy objects stored unsafely at height.

scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for unstable stacking that could collapse.

scenarios.name: Leaning bookshelf
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for furniture stability issues.

scenarios.name: Items on fridge top near edge
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Identify any objects that could fall from on top of appliances.

scenarios.name: Tools on overhead rack
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for overhead storage hazards.

scenarios.name: Unsecured wall-mount TV
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for improperly mounted electronics that could fall.

scenarios.name: Overloaded coat rack
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check for overloaded freestanding furniture.

scenarios.name: Ceiling fan with loose blade
scenarios.prompt: You are a home safety inspector analyzing an indoor security camera frame. Check the ceiling fan for any maintenance issues.
